title: Skill frontmatter
_comment: Schema for skill primitives. A skill is a STRUCTURED executable object, not just SKILL.md prose. Declares tool_access (allowed tools), policy_constraints (rules + exception handling), required_inputs (what callers must pass), and output_shape (what callers receive). Validator: hooks/validate-skill-frontmatter.py blocks malformed Write/Edit at skills/**/SKILL.md. Bypass: SKILL_VALIDATION_BYPASS=1. Includes the cross-type frontmatter contract (provenance, confidence, freshness_days, last_verified, source_count) shared across all 6 typed memory primitives.

name.description: Slug-style skill name (matches the skill folder name).

description.description: Human-readable summary used for skill discovery.

argument-hint.description: Free-form hint shown to the user about expected arguments.

tool_access.description: Whitelist of tool names this skill is permitted to call. Empty array means the skill takes no tool actions (pure prose/analysis). Names match the canonical tool ids (Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob, etc.) or MCP tool ids (mcp__server__tool).

rule.description: A single constraint expressed as an imperative (e.g. 'Never write to public repos without scrub').

exception_handling.description: What the skill does when the rule would be violated (e.g. 'abort and surface to user', 'fall back to dry-run').

policy_constraints.description: Hard rules the skill must respect. Paired with the failure path so callers and reviewers know what happens at the edge.

type.description: Type hint (string, integer, path, url, list, etc.). Free-form for now; tighten later.

required.description: True if the skill cannot run without it.

description.description: What this input means to the skill.

required_inputs.description: Inputs the caller must (or may) supply. A skill with no inputs uses an empty array.

output_shape.description: Recommended description of what the skill returns. Free-form for now: callers benefit from any structure (keys, types, example), and the schema does not enforce a fixed shape so different skills can document return values that range from a markdown report to a JSON record. Tighten in a future revision.

provenance.description: List of independent sources that back this skill definition.

confidence.description: How sure the system is the skill definition is accurate, 0.0 to 1.0.

freshness_days.description: How many days the skill definition stays fresh before re-verification is recommended.

last_verified.description: ISO 8601 date when the skill was last confirmed.

source_count.description: How many independent sources back this skill definition.
